items.claim: Luke Riley's competition level is increasing, making this a must-win fight for him.
items.quote: Luke Riley's competition level is going to get stronger, but this isn't a fight he he can afford to lose, right?

items.claim: Kai Kamaka has double the professional fight experience of Luke Riley.
items.quote: the guy's got 26 fights, he's doubled you up in terms of professional fights.

items.claim: Adrien Giannes has a significant 4-inch reach advantage over Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: Giannis 4 in reach advantage. That's considerable.

items.claim: Adrien Giannes lands 6 significant strikes per minute compared to 2.8 for Cody Garbrandt.
items.quote: Giannis six significant strikes per minute to 2.8 for Garbrandt.

items.claim: Cody Garbrandt struggles to land takedowns, averaging only one every four rounds.
items.quote: Garbrandt can get like one every four rounds.

items.claim: Gable Steveson has elite wrestling credentials.
items.quote: he's got all the accolades in wrestling, right?

items.claim: Robert Whitaker will be physically stronger at light heavyweight because he is not cutting weight.
items.quote: How good is he going to be moving up, not having to cut weight? He's going to be stronger.

items.claim: Robert Whitaker will have a speed advantage over Nikita Krylov at light heavyweight.
items.quote: I think Whitaker is going to be rejuvenated... he'll have more speed than Krillov

items.claim: King Green has a 72% takedown defense rate.
items.quote: Green has a 72% takedown defense, which is not bad.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney has not gone past the first round in his last seven fights.
items.quote: this guy hasn't been out of the first round in man about seven fights.

items.claim: Terrence McKinney's wrestling and ground-and-pound will be the deciding factor against King Green.
items.quote: I think Terrence McKenna is going to land takedowns at some point and utilize the ground and pound. That's his weapon.
